{{otheruses|||{{ill|Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:祥雲寺 (宇都宮市)]]]] [[File:Mt. Suido Brick Steps.jpg|thumb|{{ill|Suido-yama|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:水道山]] Red Brick Steps]] [[File:Tomatsuri Reservoir.jpg|thumb|{{ill|Tomatsuri Water Distribution Facility|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:戸祭配水場]]]] [[File:Tochigi Prefecture Peace Chorten.jpg|thumb|{{ill|Tochigi Prefecture Peace Stupa|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:栃木県平和仏舎利塔]]]] '''Tomatsuri-yama''' ({{ill|戸祭山|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:戸祭山]]) is a [[mountain]] located in [[Utsunomiya]], [[Tochigi Prefecture]], Japan. It is also commonly known as "'''{{ill|Suido-yama|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:水道山]]'''." The mountain has an elevation of 186.3 meters.
== Geography == The northwestern mountain range of Tochigi Prefecture stretches from the {{ill|Nikkō Sannai|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:日光山内]], which enshrines {{ill|Nikkō Futarasan Shrine|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:日光二荒山神社]] and {{ill|Nikkō Tōshō-gū|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:日光東照宮]], through {{ill|Ogura-yama (Nikkō)|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:小倉山 (日光市)]], {{ill|Atago-yama (Nikkō)|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:愛宕山 (日光市)]], {{ill|Chausu-yama (Nikkō)|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:茶臼山 (日光市)]], and {{ill|Asama-yama (Nikkō)|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:浅間山 (日光市)]], connecting to the {{ill|Shinoi-Tomiya Range|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:篠井富屋連峰]] in northern Utsunomiya. It continues to this mountain, then to {{ill|Hachiman-yama (Utsunomiya)|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:八幡山 (宇都宮市)]], and ends at its southernmost peak, {{ill|Myojin-yama (Utsunomiya)|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:明神山 (宇都宮市)]]. Tomatsuri-yama is part of the {{ill|Utsunomiya Hills|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:宇都宮丘陵]]. The urban area of Utsunomiya developed around the foothills of Tomatsuri-yama, Hachiman-yama, and Myojin-yama. Additionally, the {{ill|Tagawa River|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:田川 (利根川水系)]] flows to the east and the {{ill|Kamagawa River|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:釜川]] to the west of this mountain range.
Tomatsuri-yama is commonly referred to as "{{ill|Suido-yama|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:水道山]]" because of the [[Utsunomiya City Waterworks Bureau]]'s {{ill|Tomatsuri Water Distribution Facility|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:戸祭配水場]] located on its western slope. The current modern water tower is eye-catching, but the original structure was a rare and valuable building made of a combination of [[brick]] and {{ill|Ōya stone|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:大谷石]]. On October 18, 2006, the {{ill|Tomatsuri Water Distribution Facility|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:戸祭配水場配水池]] was registered as a {{ill|Registered Tangible Cultural Property|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:登録有形文化財]] (civil engineering structure, life-related). Near the summit, there is also a large "{{ill|Peace Stupa|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:平和仏舎利塔]]" made of Ōya stone, unique in its size.
== History == The history of the Tomatsuri-yama area is ancient, with archaeological sites such as {{ill|Tomatsuri Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:戸祭大塚古墳]], {{ill|Taniguchi-yama Kofun|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:谷口山古墳]], {{ill|Kawarazuka Kofun (Utsunomiya)|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:瓦塚古墳 (宇都宮市)]], and {{ill|Nagaoka Hyakketsu Kofun|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:長岡百穴古墳]], which date from the [[Kofun period]] to the [[Nara period]]. There are also remains of kilns, such as the {{ill|Suido-yama Tile Kiln Ruins|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:水道山瓦窯跡]], where tiles for temples like {{ill|Shimotsuke Yakushi-ji|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:薬師寺 (下野市)]] and government offices like the {{ill|Kawachi District Office Ruins|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:上神主・茂原官衙遺跡]] were fired during the Nara period. The "{{ill|Toyosato Mahoroba-no-Michi|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:豊郷まほろばの道]]" walking trail connects these northern Tomatsuri-yama historical sites.
== Surrounding Area == Tomatsuri-yama, being one of the most prominent hills in the flat {{ill|Kantō Plain|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:関東平野]], offers excellent views. On clear winter mornings, {{ill|Mount Fuji|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:富士山]] can be seen in the southeast direction.
=== Northern Educational District of Utsunomiya === The area around Tomatsuri-yama includes large residential neighborhoods such as "{{ill|Fujimigaoka Danchi (Utsunomiya)|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:富士見が丘 (宇都宮市)]]" (east slope), "{{ill|Tomatsuri-dai Danchi|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:戸祭台団地]]" (south slope), and "{{ill|Tomatsuri Green Hill|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:戸祭グリーンヒル]]" (west slope). The northern slope is developed as {{ill|Nagaoka Park (Utsunomiya)|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:長岡公園 (宇都宮市)]], and further north beyond the {{ill|Utsunomiya Ring Road|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:宇都宮環状道路]] is the "{{ill|Toyosato-dai Danchi|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:豊郷台]]," centered around the {{ill|Utsunomiya Museum of Art|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:宇都宮美術館]] within the "{{ill|Utsunomiya Cultural Forest|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:うつのみや文化の森]]." Alongside the {{ill|Teikyo University Utsunomiya Campus|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:帝京大学 宇都宮キャンパス]], this area forms the northern educational district of Utsunomiya.

Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:宇都宮駅]] West Exit: ** {{ill|Kantō Bus (Tochigi Prefecture)|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:関東自動車 (栃木県)]] via Kiyozumi to {{ill|Hosoya Garage|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:細谷車庫]], {{ill|Nikkō Tōshō-gū|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:日光東照宮]], or {{ill|Sannō Danchi|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:山王団地]]: 15 minutes, get off at "{{ill|Naka-Tomatsuri|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:中戸祭]]," then a 10-minute walk to the {{ill|Tomatsuri Water Distribution Facility|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:戸祭配水場]] or a 20-minute walk to the {{ill|Peace Stupa|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:平和仏舎利塔]]. ** Kantō Bus Nishi-Hanada & Tomatsuri-dai Loop Line: 15 minutes, get off at "{{ill|Dai-ni Green Hill Minami|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:第二グリーンヒル南]]" for a 5-minute walk to the Water Distribution Facility or at "{{ill|Dai-ichi Green Hill|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:第一グリーンヒル]]" for a 5-minute walk to the Peace Stupa and Water Distribution Facility.
Walking from Naka-Tomatsuri, you'll find a straight road leading over the {{ill|Kamagawa River|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:釜川]], with red brick steps extending beyond the old {{ill|Tomatsuri Rice Fields|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:戸祭田圃]] towards the summit where the Tomatsuri Water Distribution Tower stands tall.

{{otheruses|||{{ill|Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:祥雲寺 (宇都宮市)]]]] [[File:Mt. Suido Brick Steps.jpg|thumb|{{ill|Suido-yama|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:水道山]] Red Brick Steps]] [[File:Tomatsuri Reservoir.jpg|thumb|{{ill|Tomatsuri Water Distribution Facility|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:戸祭配水場]]]] [[File:Tochigi Prefecture Peace Chorten.jpg|thumb|{{ill|Tochigi Prefecture Peace Stupa|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:栃木県平和仏舎利塔]]]] '''Tomatsuri-yama''' ({{ill|戸祭山|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:戸祭山]]) is a [[mountain]] located in [[Utsunomiya]], [[Tochigi Prefecture]], Japan. It is also commonly known as "'''{{ill|Suido-yama|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:水道山]]'''." The mountain has an elevation of 186.3 meters.
== Geography == The northwestern mountain range of Tochigi Prefecture stretches from the {{ill|Nikkō Sannai|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:日光山内]], which enshrines {{ill|Nikkō Futarasan Shrine|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:日光二荒山神社]] and {{ill|Nikkō Tōshō-gū|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:日光東照宮]], through {{ill|Ogura-yama (Nikkō)|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:小倉山 (日光市)]], {{ill|Atago-yama (Nikkō)|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:愛宕山 (日光市)]], {{ill|Chausu-yama (Nikkō)|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:茶臼山 (日光市)]], and {{ill|Asama-yama (Nikkō)|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:浅間山 (日光市)]], connecting to the {{ill|Shinoi-Tomiya Range|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:篠井富屋連峰]] in northern Utsunomiya. It continues to this mountain, then to {{ill|Hachiman-yama (Utsunomiya)|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:八幡山 (宇都宮市)]], and ends at its southernmost peak, {{ill|Myojin-yama (Utsunomiya)|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:明神山 (宇都宮市)]]. Tomatsuri-yama is part of the {{ill|Utsunomiya Hills|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:宇都宮丘陵]]. The urban area of Utsunomiya developed around the foothills of Tomatsuri-yama, Hachiman-yama, and Myojin-yama. Additionally, the {{ill|Tagawa River|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:田川 (利根川水系)]] flows to the east and the {{ill|Kamagawa River|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:釜川]] to the west of this mountain range.
Tomatsuri-yama is commonly referred to as "{{ill|Suido-yama|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:水道山]]" because of the [[Utsunomiya City Waterworks Bureau]]'s {{ill|Tomatsuri Water Distribution Facility|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:戸祭配水場]] located on its western slope. The current modern water tower is eye-catching, but the original structure was a rare and valuable building made of a combination of [[brick]] and {{ill|Ōya stone|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:大谷石]]. On October 18, 2006, the {{ill|Tomatsuri Water Distribution Facility|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:戸祭配水場配水池]] was registered as a {{ill|Registered Tangible Cultural Property|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:登録有形文化財]] (civil engineering structure, life-related). Near the summit, there is also a large "{{ill|Peace Stupa|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:平和仏舎利塔]]" made of Ōya stone, unique in its size.
== History == The history of the Tomatsuri-yama area is ancient, with archaeological sites such as {{ill|Tomatsuri Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:戸祭大塚古墳]], {{ill|Taniguchi-yama Kofun|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:谷口山古墳]], {{ill|Kawarazuka Kofun (Utsunomiya)|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:瓦塚古墳 (宇都宮市)]], and {{ill|Nagaoka Hyakketsu Kofun|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:長岡百穴古墳]], which date from the [[Kofun period]] to the [[Nara period]]. There are also remains of kilns, such as the {{ill|Suido-yama Tile Kiln Ruins|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:水道山瓦窯跡]], where tiles for temples like {{ill|Shimotsuke Yakushi-ji|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:薬師寺 (下野市)]] and government offices like the {{ill|Kawachi District Office Ruins|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:上神主・茂原官衙遺跡]] were fired during the Nara period. The "{{ill|Toyosato Mahoroba-no-Michi|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:豊郷まほろばの道]]" walking trail connects these northern Tomatsuri-yama historical sites.
== Surrounding Area == Tomatsuri-yama, being one of the most prominent hills in the flat {{ill|Kantō Plain|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:関東平野]], offers excellent views. On clear winter mornings, {{ill|Mount Fuji|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:富士山]] can be seen in the southeast direction.
=== Northern Educational District of Utsunomiya === The area around Tomatsuri-yama includes large residential neighborhoods such as "{{ill|Fujimigaoka Danchi (Utsunomiya)|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:富士見が丘 (宇都宮市)]]" (east slope), "{{ill|Tomatsuri-dai Danchi|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:戸祭台団地]]" (south slope), and "{{ill|Tomatsuri Green Hill|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:戸祭グリーンヒル]]" (west slope). The northern slope is developed as {{ill|Nagaoka Park (Utsunomiya)|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:長岡公園 (宇都宮市)]], and further north beyond the {{ill|Utsunomiya Ring Road|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:宇都宮環状道路]] is the "{{ill|Toyosato-dai Danchi|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:豊郷台]]," centered around the {{ill|Utsunomiya Museum of Art|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:宇都宮美術館]] within the "{{ill|Utsunomiya Cultural Forest|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:うつのみや文化の森]]." Alongside the {{ill|Teikyo University Utsunomiya Campus|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:帝京大学 宇都宮キャンパス]], this area forms the northern educational district of Utsunomiya.
== Access == ; By Bus * From {{ill|JR Utsunomiya Station|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:宇都宮駅]] West Exit: ** {{ill|Kantō Bus (Tochigi Prefecture)|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:関東自動車 (栃木県)]] via Kiyozumi to {{ill|Hosoya Garage|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:細谷車庫]], {{ill|Nikkō Tōshō-gū|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:日光東照宮]], or {{ill|Sannō Danchi|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:山王団地]]: 15 minutes, get off at "{{ill|Naka-Tomatsuri|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:中戸祭]]," then a 10-minute walk to the {{ill|Tomatsuri Water Distribution Facility|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:戸祭配水場]] or a 20-minute walk to the {{ill|Peace Stupa|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:平和仏舎利塔]]. ** Kantō Bus Nishi-Hanada & Tomatsuri-dai Loop Line: 15 minutes, get off at "{{ill|Dai-ni Green Hill Minami|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:第二グリーンヒル南]]" for a 5-minute walk to the Water Distribution Facility or at "{{ill|Dai-ichi Green Hill|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:第一グリーンヒル]]" for a 5-minute walk to the Peace Stupa and Water Distribution Facility.
Walking from Naka-Tomatsuri, you'll find a straight road leading over the {{ill|Kamagawa River|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:釜川]], with red brick steps extending beyond the old {{ill|Tomatsuri Rice Fields|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:戸祭田圃]] towards the summit where the Tomatsuri Water Distribution Tower stands tall.

Suido Brick Steps.jpg|thumb|{{ill|Suido-yama|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:水道山]] Red Brick Steps]] [[File:Tomatsuri Reservoir.jpg|thumb|{{ill|Tomatsuri Water Distribution Facility|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:戸祭配水場]]]] [[File:Tochigi Prefecture Peace Chorten.jpg|thumb|{{ill|Tochigi Prefecture Peace Stupa|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:栃木県平和仏舎利塔]]]] '''Tomatsuri-yama''' ({{ill|戸祭山|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:戸祭山]]) is a [[mountain]] located in [[Utsunomiya]], [[Tochigi Prefecture]], Japan. It is also commonly known as "'''{{ill|Suido-yama|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:水道山]]'''." The mountain has an elevation of 186.3 meters.
== Geography == The northwestern mountain range of Tochigi Prefecture stretches from the {{ill|Nikkō Sannai|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:日光山内]], which enshrines {{ill|Nikkō Futarasan Shrine|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:日光二荒山神社]] and {{ill|Nikkō Tōshō-gū|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:日光東照宮]], through {{ill|Ogura-yama (Nikkō)|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:小倉山 (日光市)]], {{ill|Atago-yama (Nikkō)|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:愛宕山 (日光市)]], {{ill|Chausu-yama (Nikkō)|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:茶臼山 (日光市)]], and {{ill|Asama-yama (Nikkō)|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:浅間山 (日光市)]], connecting to the {{ill|Shinoi-Tomiya Range|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:篠井富屋連峰]] in northern Utsunomiya. It continues to this mountain, then to {{ill|Hachiman-yama (Utsunomiya)|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:八幡山 (宇都宮市)]], and ends at its southernmost peak, {{ill|Myojin-yama (Utsunomiya)|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:明神山 (宇都宮市)]]. Tomatsuri-yama is part of the {{ill|Utsunomiya Hills|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:宇都宮丘陵]]. The urban area of Utsunomiya developed around the foothills of Tomatsuri-yama, Hachiman-yama, and Myojin-yama. Additionally, the {{ill|Tagawa River|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:田川 (利根川水系)]] flows to the east and the {{ill|Kamagawa River|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:釜川]] to the west of this mountain range.
Tomatsuri-yama is commonly referred to as "{{ill|Suido-yama|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:水道山]]" because of the [[Utsunomiya City Waterworks Bureau]]'s {{ill|Tomatsuri Water Distribution Facility|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:戸祭配水場]] located on its western slope. The current modern water tower is eye-catching, but the original structure was a rare and valuable building made of a combination of [[brick]] and {{ill|Ōya stone|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:大谷石]]. On October 18, 2006, the {{ill|Tomatsuri Water Distribution Facility|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:戸祭配水場配水池]] was registered as a {{ill|Registered Tangible Cultural Property|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:登録有形文化財]] (civil engineering structure, life-related). Near the summit, there is also a large "{{ill|Peace Stupa|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:平和仏舎利塔]]" made of Ōya stone, unique in its size.
== History == The history of the Tomatsuri-yama area is ancient, with archaeological sites such as {{ill|Tomatsuri Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:戸祭大塚古墳]], {{ill|Taniguchi-yama Kofun|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:谷口山古墳]], {{ill|Kawarazuka Kofun (Utsunomiya)|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:瓦塚古墳 (宇都宮市)]], and {{ill|Nagaoka Hyakketsu Kofun|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:長岡百穴古墳]], which date from the [[Kofun period]] to the [[Nara period]]. There are also remains of kilns, such as the {{ill|Suido-yama Tile Kiln Ruins|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:水道山瓦窯跡]], where tiles for temples like {{ill|Shimotsuke Yakushi-ji|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:薬師寺 (下野市)]] and government offices like the {{ill|Kawachi District Office Ruins|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:上神主・茂原官衙遺跡]] were fired during the Nara period. The "{{ill|Toyosato Mahoroba-no-Michi|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:豊郷まほろばの道]]" walking trail connects these northern Tomatsuri-yama historical sites.
== Surrounding Area == Tomatsuri-yama, being one of the most prominent hills in the flat {{ill|Kantō Plain|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:関東平野]], offers excellent views. On clear winter mornings, {{ill|Mount Fuji|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:富士山]] can be seen in the southeast direction.
=== Northern Educational District of Utsunomiya === The area around Tomatsuri-yama includes large residential neighborhoods such as "{{ill|Fujimigaoka Danchi (Utsunomiya)|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:富士見が丘 (宇都宮市)]]" (east slope), "{{ill|Tomatsuri-dai Danchi|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:戸祭台団地]]" (south slope), and "{{ill|Tomatsuri Green Hill|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:戸祭グリーンヒル]]" (west slope). The northern slope is developed as {{ill|Nagaoka Park (Utsunomiya)|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:長岡公園 (宇都宮市)]], and further north beyond the {{ill|Utsunomiya Ring Road|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:宇都宮環状道路]] is the "{{ill|Toyosato-dai Danchi|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:豊郷台]]," centered around the {{ill|Utsunomiya Museum of Art|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:宇都宮美術館]] within the "{{ill|Utsunomiya Cultural Forest|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:うつのみや文化の森]]." Alongside the {{ill|Teikyo University Utsunomiya Campus|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:帝京大学 宇都宮キャンパス]], this area forms the northern educational district of Utsunomiya.
== Access == ; By Bus * From {{ill|JR Utsunomiya Station|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:宇都宮駅]] West Exit: ** {{ill|Kantō Bus (Tochigi Prefecture)|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:関東自動車 (栃木県)]] via Kiyozumi to {{ill|Hosoya Garage|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:細谷車庫]], {{ill|Nikkō Tōshō-gū|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:日光東照宮]], or {{ill|Sannō Danchi|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:山王団地]]: 15 minutes, get off at "{{ill|Naka-Tomatsuri|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:中戸祭]]," then a 10-minute walk to the {{ill|Tomatsuri Water Distribution Facility|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:戸祭配水場]] or a 20-minute walk to the {{ill|Peace Stupa|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:平和仏舎利塔]]. ** Kantō Bus Nishi-Hanada & Tomatsuri-dai Loop Line: 15 minutes, get off at "{{ill|Dai-ni Green Hill Minami|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:第二グリーンヒル南]]" for a 5-minute walk to the Water Distribution Facility or at "{{ill|Dai-ichi Green Hill|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:第一グリーンヒル]]" for a 5-minute walk to the Peace Stupa and Water Distribution Facility.
Walking from Naka-Tomatsuri, you'll find a straight road leading over the {{ill|Kamagawa River|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:釜川]], with red brick steps extending beyond the old {{ill|Tomatsuri Rice Fields|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:戸祭田圃]] towards the summit where the Tomatsuri Water Distribution Tower stands tall.

Suido Brick Steps.jpg|thumb|{{ill|Suido-yama|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:水道山]] Red Brick Steps]] [[File:Tomatsuri Reservoir.jpg|thumb|{{ill|Tomatsuri Water Distribution Facility|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:戸祭配水場]]]] [[File:Tochigi Prefecture Peace Chorten.jpg|thumb|{{ill|Tochigi Prefecture Peace Stupa|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:栃木県平和仏舎利塔]]]] '''Tomatsuri-yama''' ({{ill|戸祭山|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:戸祭山]]) is a [[mountain]] located in [[Utsunomiya]], [[Tochigi Prefecture]], Japan. It is also commonly known as "'''{{ill|Suido-yama|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:水道山]]'''." The mountain has an elevation of 186.3 meters.
== Geography == The northwestern mountain range of Tochigi Prefecture stretches from the {{ill|Nikkō Sannai|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:日光山内]], which enshrines {{ill|Nikkō Futarasan Shrine|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:日光二荒山神社]] and {{ill|Nikkō Tōshō-gū|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:日光東照宮]], through {{ill|Ogura-yama (Nikkō)|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:小倉山 (日光市)]], {{ill|Atago-yama (Nikkō)|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:愛宕山 (日光市)]], {{ill|Chausu-yama (Nikkō)|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:茶臼山 (日光市)]], and {{ill|Asama-yama (Nikkō)|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:浅間山 (日光市)]], connecting to the {{ill|Shinoi-Tomiya Range|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:篠井富屋連峰]] in northern Utsunomiya. It continues to this mountain, then to {{ill|Hachiman-yama (Utsunomiya)|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:八幡山 (宇都宮市)]], and ends at its southernmost peak, {{ill|Myojin-yama (Utsunomiya)|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:明神山 (宇都宮市)]]. Tomatsuri-yama is part of the {{ill|Utsunomiya Hills|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:宇都宮丘陵]]. The urban area of Utsunomiya developed around the foothills of Tomatsuri-yama, Hachiman-yama, and Myojin-yama. Additionally, the {{ill|Tagawa River|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:田川 (利根川水系)]] flows to the east and the {{ill|Kamagawa River|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:釜川]] to the west of this mountain range.
Tomatsuri-yama is commonly referred to as "{{ill|Suido-yama|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:水道山]]" because of the [[Utsunomiya City Waterworks Bureau]]'s {{ill|Tomatsuri Water Distribution Facility|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:戸祭配水場]] located on its western slope. The current modern water tower is eye-catching, but the original structure was a rare and valuable building made of a combination of [[brick]] and {{ill|Ōya stone|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:大谷石]]. On October 18, 2006, the {{ill|Tomatsuri Water Distribution Facility|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:戸祭配水場配水池]] was registered as a {{ill|Registered Tangible Cultural Property|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:登録有形文化財]] (civil engineering structure, life-related). Near the summit, there is also a large "{{ill|Peace Stupa|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:平和仏舎利塔]]" made of Ōya stone, unique in its size.
== History == The history of the Tomatsuri-yama area is ancient, with archaeological sites such as {{ill|Tomatsuri Ōtsuka Kofun|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:戸祭大塚古墳]], {{ill|Taniguchi-yama Kofun|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:谷口山古墳]], {{ill|Kawarazuka Kofun (Utsunomiya)|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:瓦塚古墳 (宇都宮市)]], and {{ill|Nagaoka Hyakketsu Kofun|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:長岡百穴古墳]], which date from the [[Kofun period]] to the [[Nara period]]. There are also remains of kilns, such as the {{ill|Suido-yama Tile Kiln Ruins|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:水道山瓦窯跡]], where tiles for temples like {{ill|Shimotsuke Yakushi-ji|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:薬師寺 (下野市)]] and government offices like the {{ill|Kawachi District Office Ruins|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:上神主・茂原官衙遺跡]] were fired during the Nara period. The "{{ill|Toyosato Mahoroba-no-Michi|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:豊郷まほろばの道]]" walking trail connects these northern Tomatsuri-yama historical sites.
== Surrounding Area == Tomatsuri-yama, being one of the most prominent hills in the flat {{ill|Kantō Plain|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:関東平野]], offers excellent views. On clear winter mornings, {{ill|Mount Fuji|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:original pages]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Shōun-ji (Utsunomiya)-qq]] [[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:富士山]] can be seen in the southeast direction.

[[Category:last 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:日光東照宮]], through {{ill|Ogura-yama (Nikkō)|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] 150 pages as of feb 11]][[ja:茶臼山 (日光市)]], and {{ill|Asama-yama (Nikkō)|en}}[[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]]
